name: Spirited Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first three chocolates in a bowl of a food processor or blender and finely chop them.
2. Heat the whipping cream to just simmering point.
3. With the machine running, gradually add the hot cream to the chopped chocolate, mixing until the chocolate is completely melted.
4. Scrape down the sides of the container to ensure all chocolate is melted.
5. Add the liqueur and blend briefly.
6. Cover a cookie sheet with wax paper. Spoon the mixture into thin layers onto the cookie sheet.
7. Refrigerate for about 30 minutes, or until the chocolate is firm.
8. Return the mixture to the food processor or blender and process until light and fluffy, about 30 seconds.
9. Spread the mixture back onto the cookie sheet and refrigerate for another 20 minutes, or until the chocolate can be formed into balls but is not hard.
10. Carefully shape the chocolate into 1-inch balls.
11. Freeze until firm.
12. Melt 6 ounces of sweet baking chocolate in a small heavy saucepan over low heat.
13. Dip the frozen chocolate balls into the melted chocolate and place on wax paper-lined baking sheet.
14. Sprinkle lightly with cocoa.
15. Keep frozen until ready to serve.
Use whatever flavor liqueur you wish; suggestions are: raspberry, almond, peppermint, or orange liqueurs.
